lineage.method: SP-C Phase 2: v6 (lsk3 + F-cascade) at h10d with weight halved 0.05 -> 0.025 to compensate for stronger h10d signal magnitude. Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.

doc_e12_falsification_2026_04_29.result: PASS — t=+10.75 strongly significant, 4× the doc 2.5σ floor

admission_audit_2026_04_29.weight_calibration: Conservative initial pick. Raw IC 0.052 × v91 ratio 3.25 = 0.17 (would be aggressive). F62 lesson at IC -0.024 → w=-0.08 was Pareto-optimal; transferring that ratio (~3.3) to recency_score gives w≈0.17 but conservatism suggests starting at 0.10 (~50% of theoretical) and scanning up.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: SP-C Phase 2: SP-A v6 score: extends v_alpha_v1_lsk3 by adding liq_cascade_recency_score_5d (per-subject 1h liquidation cascade exponential-decay 5d recency accumulator). Doc §E.12 mechanism: CoinGlass 1h liquidation flow identifies cascade events; the 24-72h post-cascade window has documented mean reversion. Cross-sectionally, assets with HIGHER recent cascade intensity OUTPERFORM in next 10 days (post-cascade recovery alpha). Sign empirical: POSITIVE. Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction. Score adds +0.05 * z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d). Position size multiplied by W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. Doc §E.12 prescribes mean reversion 24-72h after cascade; the 5d recency window covers the full mean-reversion horizon. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops more than 0.3 below v_alpha_v1_lsk3_g_v2 (+2.147) without compensating regime improvement; OR (b) regime_holdout fails (worst regime below -2.0 OR positive_regime_fraction below 1/3); OR (c) doc §E.12 universe-pooled post-cascade 24h abnormal return t-stat falls below 2.5σ on this panel.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) +0.025*z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

legacy_comparator_reason: Demoted after execution-aligned labels, ready-row feature handling, train-only v5_rw_bridge, and fixed-set paired comparison. New evidence shows v6_h10d no longer clears the h10d promotion gate: it is statistically indistinguishable from lsk3_g_v2_h10d on full OOS period returns and materially underperforms v5_h10d / v5_rw_bridge_h10d. Keep only as a legacy comparator for audit continuity.
former_active_alternative_reason: SP-C Phase 3 winner: v6 (lsk3 + F-cascade w=0.025) at h10d under quant_validation_contract.v10_h10d. Walk-forward median +2.832 (highest of any candidate, +19% over v6_h5d +2.373). Sole h10d strict-passer (v1/v5/v8 all fail rotation regime at h10d; only F-cascade provides meaningful rotation regime protection at the longer horizon). 2/3 positive regimes vs v6_h5d 1/3. drawdown_rebound flips strongly positive (+3.162) at h10d.

verified_outcome_2026_04_29.note: h10d strategy is qualitatively different from h5d — bigger trend wins, more rotation pain, drawdown_rebound flip. Net effect: best walk-forward + best regime breadth, validated under sqrt(2)-scaled regime + sharpe_anomaly thresholds.
